гҖҺBurberryгҖҸ
Burberry classic vintage underarm bag, glossy leather adjustable shoulder strap. Shoulder strap can be fixed to the bag with a buckle, adjustable for underarm or hand carry. High-end custom piece is super exquisite, soft and comfortable texture, premium feel. Imported glossy leather trim creates strong layers yet remains harmonious and not abrupt. Lightweight, compact yet convenient for commuting, capacity is okay.
Dimensions: 24Г—13Г—8cm
